old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-3mns","title":"Harden APRS-IS session authorization","description":"Review during project-LICHEN-2auf.46 found AprsIsClient::send permits pre-login and Unverified receive-only sessions to transmit, and required-line timeouts are surfaced as UnexpectedEof. Define explicit session-phase/authorization checks, preserve timeout-vs-EOF semantics, and add deterministic login/send/write-failure tests. This is separate from lost bounded-line recovery.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-19T05:22:35.920228Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T05:22:35.920228Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-3mns","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.46","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-19T05:22:36.093299Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Explicit session authorization checks in send()/can_transmit(); read_required_line now distinguishes timeout (TimedOut error) vs EOF (UnexpectedEof) preserving semantics; added 2 deterministic mock-server tests for login/unverified-reject-send, write-failure-poison. 21/21 tests pass. Cargo clippy clean on crate.
